message:
fix(deps): update fsqlite to b81d437a (macOS type mismatch fix)

Resolves CI release failure: fsqlite-vfs unix.rs had i32/i16 type
mismatch for libc::F_UNLCK on macOS darwin_amd64/darwin_arm64 targets.
The fix (i16::try_from) is now in the latest frankensqlite main.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
